ind a good solution. [Unlike Woojae, who wasn't convinced]

She talks in circles. I feel like I'm having the same kind
of conversation here, hitting my chest while we talk. Let's move on to the next story. I'm worried about getting married
after 5 years of dating. Hello, I've been in a passionate relationship
with my boyfriend for 5 years. He proposed two years ago,
but I wasn't ready for marriage, so I declined. Now, however, we've started
talking about marriage. The thing that bothers me is his mother. My boyfriend had an older brother
who passed away in an accident, and ever since, his mother has
become very attached to him. After hearing about the proposal,
she met me and opposed our marriage. The reasons she gave were that
my father passed away due to illness, my family's financial situation isn't good,
and that my profession is a chef. After hearing this from his father,
my boyfriend has been even more determined to push for marriage. While I really want to spend
the rest of my life with him, I can't shake the hurt his mother has caused me. Should I go through with this marriage? I've been on the show 'Love Naggers' for almost 7 years now, soon to be 8, and I've come across so many stories like this. Our consistent answer is, 'this is not okay.' To put it bluntly, if the mother
gets upset about something, there's no solution when it comes to marriage. Especially since her obsession stems from a tragic accident, right? On top of that, there's nothing about you that she's pleased with. [The mother-in-law isn't happy]
From your family's financial situation [with anything]
to your job, she doesn't approve. Now, you might think that you and your husband could just live on your own, but that's not how it works. There will inevitably be friction with his family, and each time that happens, you'll face your mother-in-law's harassment, disregard, and endless nagging.

Should I lose weight? Hello! I'm a woman in my early 20s
currently in a relationship. The thing is, my boyfriend is skinnier than me. He's almost as thin as Woojae, and he doesn't gain weight but loses it quickly. So, when we eat together, only I gain weight. I'm of average weight and
usually don't feel the need to diet, but because my boyfriend is so thin,
I worry he might think poorly of my body and I feel like I should lose weight. Even though my boyfriend
doesn't care and likes me a lot, I can't help but think this way. Woojae, have you ever dated a girlfriend
who was bigger than you? I should just stop worrying about this, right? It's not all about weight. What really matters is frame. A lot of people are shocked when they meet me. 'Why are you so big?' 'Whoa!' and are really surprised. On TV, I might look like a toothpick walking around, but I actually wear large-sized clothes. My frame is big. [A more important issue than the worry]
I feel like people misunderstand me, so I wanted to clear that up. You'd be surprised if you saw me in real life. Change that thought! If your boyfriend had an issue with your weight, or if he was worried about being skinnier than you, that could be a problem. But that's not the case here. If you're feeling self-conscious just because of your own thoughts, [The problem is solved if you just rethink]
I think you just need to let that go. This is all about worrying about
how others perceive you. Like I always say, when you're in a relationship, stop meeting up with friends

title: 💻 극’T’와 극’F’의 상극(?) 연애 고민 상담 | ISTP 주우재 고민 상담소
text:
of your own thoughts, [The problem is solved if you just rethink]
I think you just need to let that go. This is all about worrying about
how others perceive you. Like I always say, when you're in a relationship, stop meeting up with friends [Stop comparing your relationship to others']
or going on double dates. Just date each other, but don't isolate yourselves. Each person should maintain their own life. Then, you won't have these kinds of thoughts. Why does it matter how you look to others? [Who cares what others think?]
What's the point? They're not the ones living your relationship. Let's hear from Ji-woo one last time before we wrap up. Ooooh, guys don't care that much
about their girlfriend's body. Really...? Hahaha. Isn't it normal to worry a bit? Like about health, for instance. And if you truly want to lose weight, you should do it for yourself,
not for your boyfriend, okay? Stop worrying needlessly
and love yourself as you are. [100% Agree]
Oh, that's so true. If I look at myself and feel something wrong or if it's affecting my health, then working on that [A healthy diet for yourself is]
would be a healthy way [always OK]
to manage things. But if your focus is on
'Do we look bad to others?' or 'Does my boyfriend think I'm fat?', then if you start losing weight for that reason, I think it leads down an unhealthy path. I think Ji-woo's point here is really good. Do it for yourself, not because of your boyfriend. Oh, this is great! It's like a quote! [Still being playful]
Feels wise, doesn't it? [Today's Joo Woojae] That was the story for today. [Cold but logical solutions]
I tend to be very fact-based in my responses, which some people find refreshing, but others might feel hurt. We tried something new today by Ji-woo [Get consultation through the 'more info']
from wrtn's character chat. Ji-woo has a 100% 'F' personality, and there's definitely some comforting words that come from that. When we combined forces, I think Ji-woo and I could open up a counseling center together, haha. [Me? Really???]
I really think Ji-woo is a great partner, [We made a great team...]
covering both sides well. Recently, wrtn introduced a new feature called 'AI Report.' If you input materials from class, [Contents needed for assignments or work]
the AI organizes it [AI-provided features]
and helps draft assignments to some extent. Why is this just now being released? Can we put in engineering subjects into AI Report, too? Like solid mechanics or

title: 💻 극’T’와 극’F’의 상극(?) 연애 고민 상담 | ISTP 주우재 고민 상담소
text:
ents needed for assignments or work]
the AI organizes it [AI-provided features]
and helps draft assignments to some extent. Why is this just now being released? Can we put in engineering subjects into AI Report, too? Like solid mechanics or thermodynamics problem? [Science-related problems are easier] Oh... because it gives me the results. Back in the day, I used to sit in the library... [A bit unfair for past engineering students...]
working through those problem sets... If you're falling behind on your reports, go to wrtn right now, at least get a draft ready,
and make sure to revise it well. If you submit the draft as is, you'll get caught. [Professors know everything]
These days, as AI advances, professors are also keeping pace with those advancements. [Make sure to include your own thoughts]
So revise carefully [Please write your reports thoughtfully!]
and add your own thoughts when writing. I'll wrap things up by introducing today's outfit. The outerwear I'm wearing is from ESPIONAGE, ['Fall Haul Episode' Reference]
which I showed you recently [OUTER - ESPIONAGE]
when I was introducing some items I've been interested in. I checked recently, and it's on sale [Great value for money]
for about 130,000 won. Honestly, regardless of the price, it's so comfortable to wear, the color is great, and the fit is perfect, so I've been wearing this Coverall a lot lately. The t-shirt I'm wearing underneath is [TOP - BRONSON]
 a BRONSON, and the pants are LVC 55501, which I probably explained [PANTS - LVC]
in a previous video while talking about denim. Now, these shoes are something to boast about. [Check out my beautiful shoes]
Look at this. Look at the side line. [The more I see them, the more amazed I am]
Oh man. [SHOES - THE 2 MONKEYS]
These are from a brand called THE 2 MONKEYS, and the model is called sportif. They use brown chamois leather inside, [The more I wear them]
so the more you wear them, the leather ages [the more vintage charm they have]
and reveals a bit of brown from within. I've been wearing these boots often. Today, I was with wrtn, [Counseling session continues in part 2]
and we'll continue with life counseling in the next video. To be honest, I need to talk to you more bluntly about life, [Confident in my own cool-headed advice]
so I'll do it alone next time. If you enjoyed the relationship counseling, please subscribe, like, and leave a comment. And no need to turn on notifications. I'll see you in the next video. Farewell.
